# DelusionDetection

> Detected hallucination or confidence mismatch in LLM output

## Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| id | uuid | yes | auto | Primary key |
| agentLabel | string | yes | - | Which agent produced the delusional output |
| llmCallId | string | yes | - | Specific LLM call that was delusional |
| delusionType | hallucination \| contradiction \| confidence-mismatch \| circular-reasoning \| fabricated-reference | yes | - | Type of delusion detected |
| confidence | float | yes | - | Model's stated confidence (0-1) |
| actualAccuracy | float | yes | - | Verified accuracy (0-1) |
| divergenceScore | float | yes | - | Confidence minus accuracy |
| inputSample | string | yes | - | The input that triggered the delusional output |
| outputSample | string | yes | - | The delusional output |
| explanation | string | yes | - | Why this was flagged as delusional |
| verified | boolean | yes | false | Whether a human has verified this detection |
| status | detected \| confirmed \| dismissed | yes | detected | Current status |
| createdAt | datetime | yes | auto | Creation timestamp |
| updatedAt | datetime | yes | auto | Last update timestamp |

## API Endpoints

- `GET /api/delusion-detection` — List all
- `POST /api/delusion-detection` — Create
- `GET /api/delusion-detection/:id` — Get by ID
- `PUT /api/delusion-detection/:id` — Update
- `DELETE /api/delusion-detection/:id` — Delete
